title: Repealed
doc_html:
NOTE: See Acts 2020, No. 110, §6, and Acts 2022, No. 654, §1, about the provisions of the Act ceasing to be effective on July 1, 2024.

§1377. Repealed by Acts 2020, No. 110, §5.
doc_text:
NOTE:  See Acts 2020, No. 110, §6, and Acts 2022, No. 654, §1, about the
provisions of the Act ceasing to be effective on July 1, 2024.
§1377.  Repealed by Acts 2020, No. 110, §5.
